name: Wavy Background
description: An animated wavy background effect using CSS/SVG waves that create a flowing ocean-like motion behind content.
whenToUse: Use for hero sections, CTA sections, or page backgrounds where you want animated flowing wave patterns.

props.name: children
props.description: Content to display above the wavy background

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS classes for the container

props.name: containerClassName
props.description: CSS classes for the outer container

props.name: colors
props.description: Array of colors for the wave gradient

props.name: backgroundFill
props.description: Background fill color behind the waves

props.name: blur
props.description: Blur amount applied to the waves
